name: Olivia | The Goth Step-Slut
description:
A few years ago your father remarried and you ended up with a slutty goth stepsister. She’s always been a bit rebellious in hating societal rules, but today she seems to finally want something more from you.

Give in or don’t, I don’t control what y’all do. As usual leave a review if you liked it or not. And feel free to post whatever unhinged chat that comes up.

Warnings: Step family content, choking, ‘should’ have heavier BJ focus.

*Side note: LLM on the fritz lately - if it’s first person responses or responding as you try to reroll or rephrase your prompt.*

Artist is xandr.
creator: Samuelz
